_meta.purpose: Extend HISTORICAL_FINGERPRINTS with percentile-rank scores (0-100) for the 25 raw inputs at each fingerprint date. Values represent where each input sat in its own 90-day rolling distribution at that moment (NOT absolute price). Match the semantics of the raw_factor_tilt percentile pipeline so similarity engine reads the same scale.
_meta.calibration: v1 had only 3 most-recent dates. v2 populates all 12 fingerprints with approximate percentile values derived from public market knowledge of each moment. _confidence field per date — refine with yfinance/FRED historical lookups for higher precision.
_meta.rule: Only include keys where the percentile is meaningfully off-neutral. Keys at exactly 50 (neutral) get omitted to avoid diluting similarity scoring.
_meta.version_notes: v2 adds the 9 previously empty fingerprints. All 12 now have data.

2017-12-17._note: BTC futures launch top, retail mania peak. Crypto extremes very high, equities elevated. Fed balance at QE peak. VIX historically low. Funding rates extreme.

2018-12-15._note: Bear market capitulation low. Q4 2018 equity selloff in progress. Crypto in deep winter. Risk-off across the board. VIX elevated. Fed pivoting dovish.

2019-06-26._note: Intermediate BTC top ~$13k after 4-month rally from bottom. Equities recovering. Mixed signals — crypto bullish, macro uncertain. Fed cut on the table.

2020-03-12._note: COVID crash, the ULTIMATE panic moment. Everything sold simultaneously. VIX at all-time-high zone (~75). Liquidity event. Beginning of unprecedented Fed response.

2020-12-16._note: Post-halving rally, BTC breaking 2017 ATH after 3 years. Stimulus-era equity bull. DXY weak. Gold and silver elevated. Risk-on with monetary tailwind.

2021-04-14._note: Coinbase IPO top, BTC ~$64k. Crypto mania peak v1 (DeFi summer hangover, NFTs early). Stocks at ATH. Inflation discourse emerging. DXY weak.

2021-11-08._note: Final BTC ATH ~$69k. Memecoin season (SHIB, DOGE round 2). NFT mania peak. Stocks at ATH. DXY recovering. Pre-Fed-tightening regime change about to begin.

2022-05-12._note: LUNA/UST collapse, crypto winter starting. Stocks correcting (Q1-Q2 2022 selloff). Fed hiking aggressively. DXY strong. Risk-off broadly.

2022-11-21._note: FTX collapse aftermath, crypto bottom zone. Equities also bottoming. Fed near peak hawkishness. DXY peaked.

2024-03-14._note: Post-ETF intermediate top. ETF inflows roaring, BTC at ~73k high, sp500 near 5150 ATH, gold rallying, copper mid, oil mid, vix low, us10y elevated ~4.3. Memecoin mania peak.

2024-08-05._note: Yen carry unwind / Aug 5 mini-crash. VIX spiked (~38), risk assets dumped, gold flat-to-down briefly, dxy weak, fed cut expectations rising.

2025-01-20._note: Trump inauguration / late-cycle top zone. BTC ~109k ATH, sp500 ~6100 area, dxy strong, us10y elevated, MSTR mania peak, memecoin echo wave, AI capex frenzy still on.
